agentRecommendation.reasoning: The ONLY Commons image specifically categorised as a Cape Schanck boardwalk ('Boardwalks in Victoria, Australia' category). 4608x3456 — strong resolution. Shows the trail infrastructure that the brief specifically requires. Taken May 2016 (autumn) — perfect seasonal match for the Peninsula Insider editorial tone. Distinct from place-cape-schanck-01 (Pulpit Rock dawn) and from explore-hub-hero-01. SA override required.

rejected.note: Shows the view but not the boardwalk infrastructure.
General coastline — doesn't show the walk at all. Backup only.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy. Week 3 slot advanced to this sprint.
